title: nigella integrifolia
intro: Nigella integrifolia, also known as Black Cumin, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigella integrifolia include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or oils, and can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically to promote skin health.
